title: Ted Lucas’ Lost 1979 Album Impossible Love Being Released On New Third Man Box Set
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Last year, Third Man Records reissued Ted Lucas’ 1975 cult classic self-titled album. It was the only record the late Detroit musician had put out, but it turns out he’d made another. The post Ted Lucas’ Lost 1979 Album <em>Impossible Love</em> Being Released On New Third Man Box Set appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Last year, Third Man Records reissued Ted Lucas' 1975 cult classic self-titled album. It was the only record the late Detroit musician had put out, but it turns out he'd made another. It was called Impossible Love, and now it's finally being released in a new box set through Jack White's label.

Impossible Love was recorded in 1979 and produced by Don Was. As for the other discs, Strange Mysterious Sounds: Group Recordings (1965-1970) features music he made with his bands the Spike Drivers, the Misty Wizards, and the Horny Toads. Rainy Days (1970-1974), which is out today, has live performances, unreleased studio tracks, and intimate home recordings. Stream it below.

Strange Mysterious Sounds: Group Recordings (1965-1970)
01 The Spike Drivers – "Strange Mysterious Sounds"
02 The Misty Wizards – "It’s Love"
03 The Horny Toads – "High On Love"
04 The Spike Drivers – "High Time"
05 The Misty Wizards – "Often I Wonder"
06 The Misty Wizards – "Harold Lloyd"
07 The Spike Drivers – "I’m So Glad"
08 The Spike Drivers – "Can’t Stand the Pain"
09 The Misty Wizards – "Love Took A Trip"
10 The Spike Drivers – "Blue Law Sunday"
11 The Horny Toads – "Head In California"

Rainy Days: Solo Recordings (1970-1974)
01 "You’ve Got The Power"
02 "Rainy Days"
03 "It’s Love"
04 "Nobody Loves Me Like My Baby Does"
05 "Stay High"
06 "It’s Not Easy"
07 "Anastasia"
08 "Take What You Need"
09 "Driftin’ Free"
10 "Images Of Life"
11 "I Wish I Knew"

Impossible Love: The Unfinished Second Album (1976-1979)
01 "Slow Motion Ocean (Of Love)"
02 "Impossible Love"
03 "What Can I Believe In Without Love"
04 "Searching For Love"
05 "You Win Again"
06 "Sgt. Pinhead"
07 "If I Can’t Be Your Lover (I Won’t Be Your Friend)"
08 "How Does It Feel"
09 "I Can See It In Your Eyes"
10 "Impossible Love [Acoustic]"

Images Of Live is out 5/22 via Third Man. Pre-order it here.
